title: Nate Derbinsky Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Nate Derbinsky Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Nate Derbinsky
Khoury Faculty
PhD in Computer Science and Engineering, University of Michigan
London Campus
By the time Nate Derbinsky entered high school, he’d been running his own software company for years. Now he shares that wealth of experience with his students, with the goal of providing CS education to students of all backgrounds and enabling young computer scientists to enjoy the sorts of opportunities he did.
When you bring a lot of different people to the table that think in different ways, and they have different
expertise, you can have that much more impact going into industry, changing things, and solving new problems that nobody had even thought of before
Nate Derbinsky, Associate Dean of Teaching Faculty
Explore all Khoury Stories
